ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Brief medical history of the patient */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the patient */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the patient */,
  "cp" INTEGER /* Chest pain type */,
  "trestbps" INTEGER /* Resting blood pressure */,
  "chol" INTEGER /* Cholesterol level */,
  "fbs" INTEGER /* Fasting blood sugar */,
  "restecg" INTEGER /* Resting electrocardiogram results */,
  "thalach" INTEGER /* Maximum heart rate achieved */,
  "exang" INTEGER /* Exercise-induced angina */,
  "oldpeak" REAL /* ST depression induced by exercise */,
  "slope" REAL /* Slope of the peak exercise ST segment */,
  "ca" INTEGER /* Number of major vessels colored by fluoroscopy */,
  "thal" INTEGER /* Thalassemia */,
  "target" INTEGER /* Diagnosis target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospitals" (
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital */,
  "hospital_name" TEXT /* Name of the hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the hospital */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the hospital */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the hospital */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the hospital was established */,
  "number_of_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds in the hospital */,
  "number_of_staff" INTEGER /* Number of medical staff in the hospital */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the medical staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the medical staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the medical staff member (e.g., doctor, nurse, administrator) */,
  "hospital_id" INTEGER /* ID of the hospital the medical staff member belongs to */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the medical staff member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the medical staff member */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical staff member */,
  "qualification" TEXT /* Qualification or degree of the medical staff member */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the medical staff member */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the medical staff member was hired */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_staff_hospital_id FOREIGN KEY ("hospital_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being diagnosed */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis for the patient */,
  "treatment_plan" TEXT /* Treatment plan for the patient */,
  "date_of_diagnosis" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosing_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who made the diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the diagnosis */,
  "treatment_start_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan started */,
  "treatment_end_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment plan is expected to end */,
  "follow_up_required" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if follow-up is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_diagnosing_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("diagnosing_doctor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lab result */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the lab result belongs to */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the lab test */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the lab test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date the lab test was performed */,
  "lab_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lab technician who performed the test */,
  "test_location" TEXT /* Location where the test was performed */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Reference range for the test result */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the lab result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the lab result (e.g., pending, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lab_results_lab_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_technician_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_imaging" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical image */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the medical image belongs to */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of medical image (e.g., X-ray, MRI) */,
  "image_date" TEXT /* Date the medical image was taken */,
  "imaging_technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the imaging technician who performed the imaging */,
  "imaging_location" TEXT /* Location where the imaging was performed */,
  "imaging_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the imaging */,
  "image_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the image (e.g., good, fair, poor) */,
  "diagnostic_imaging" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the imaging is diagnostic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_imaging_imaging_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("imaging_technician_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_imaging_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "appointments" (
  "appointment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each appointment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the appointment belongs to */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the medical staff member the appointment is with */,
  "appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the appointment */,
  "appointment_time" TEXT /* Time of the appointment */,
  "appointment_status" TEXT /* Status of the appointment (e.g., scheduled, completed, canceled) */,
  "appointment_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the appointment */,
  "appointment_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the appointment */,
  "appointment_location" TEXT /* Location of the appointment */,
  "follow_up_appointment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the follow-up appointment, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_follow_up_appointment_id FOREIGN KEY ("follow_up_appointment_id") REFERENCES appointments ("appointment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_appointments_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "prescriptions" (
  "prescription_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prescription */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the prescription belongs to */,
  "medication" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage instructions */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date the prescription was written */,
  "prescribing_doctor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the doctor who wrote the prescription */,
  "prescription_status" TEXT /* Status of the prescription (e.g., active, expired) */,
  "refills_allowed" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "pharmacy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pharmacy where the prescription can be filled */,
  "prescription_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the prescription */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prescription_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_prescribing_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("prescribing_doctor_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_pharmacy_id FOREIGN KEY ("pharmacy_id") REFERENCES hospitals ("hospital_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_prescriptions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "billing" (
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bill */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the bill belongs to */,
  "bill_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the bill */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Payment status of the bill */,
  "bill_type" TEXT /* Type of bill (e.g., consultation, lab test, imaging) */,
  "service_provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the service provider */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, cash, insurance) */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date for the bill */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the bill was paid */,
  "bill_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the bill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bill_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_service_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("service_provider_id") REFERENCES medical_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_billing_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient the insurance record belongs to */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "insurance_plan" TEXT /* Type of insurance plan */,
  "coverage_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the insurance coverage */,
  "coverage_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the insurance coverage */,
  "primary_insurance" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if this is the primary insurance */,
  "insurance_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the insurance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
